per_query.thought: Retrieve claims describing CNN GPU memory efficiency with fast data layout transformation, pooling working-set expansion in on-chip memory, and kernel reconstruction using fusion and thread injection.

Retrieve distributed matrix processor passages executing tensor instructions for neural-network computation, collecting output tensor statistics, and dynamically determining decimal position for numerical representation.
Locate flow-based deep-learning wavelet disclosures for a 2D mesh of processing elements using virtual-channel, task, index, data element, and control/data specifiers.
Search claims for chiplets or SOCs on a common interposer with first and second common protocol interface circuits coupled by a communication link to form a serial protocol interface.
Retrieve IC package disclosures where a first die includes FeRAM bit-cells and a vertically stacked second inference die includes multiplier computational logic coupled to memory.
Retrieve representative claims for a microelectronic device with a conductive via electrode, substrate surface gap region, and stress relief structure between the via and microelectronic component.
Retrieve memory-device method claims reciting receiving compressed data at a processing-in-memory PIM device and decompressing the compressed data on the PIM device.
Retrieve neural network unit claims with N processing units, registers reading memory rows, multiplexed-register rotation, and column-channel-row convolution of HxWxC inputs.
Retrieve electronic-device claims for wafer-bonded memory and logic dies, modular memory units, three-dimensional storage-transistor arrays, and exposed control address data conductors.
Retrieve artificial neural network apparatus claims where processing units receive input-neuron data and synaptic weights, generate partial results, and share partial results over an interconnect.

Retrieve tensor-processing accelerator claims on numerical representation optimization, such as quantized tensor formats or adaptive floating-point precision, to contrast with CNN GPU data layout, data locality, and inter-kernel redundancy memory behavior.

Retrieve AI processor package claims for vertically stacked memory and computational logic dies, including FeRAM storage of input data and weight factors, to compare with common protocol interface communication across chiplets on an interposer.

Retrieve system-integration claims for memory-side decompression circuitry and for 3-D convolution on-chip memory organization, including kernel memory space, input feature map memory clusters, output feature map memory clusters, and memory controllers.

Retrieve claim language comparing wafer-bonded modular memory units with exposed conductors for control, address, and data signals against cooperative ANN processing units sharing partial results over an interconnect.

Retrieve paired evidence for CNN GPU kernel reconstruction, data layout selection, and off-chip memory locality alongside chiplet serial protocol interface using common protocol interface circuits and data/control packets on an interposer.
Retrieve patent passages on CNN off-chip memory data layout, data locality, and inter-kernel redundancy versus memory-controller PIM register buffering for non-PIM read/write instructions.

Retrieve claims contrasting interposer chiplet serial protocol interface using common protocol interface circuits with wafer-bonded memory die and logic die conductors for embedded high-bandwidth memory access.
Retrieve evidence for compressed data received and decompressed on a PIM device and embedded high-bandwidth fast-access memory formed by wafer bonding memory and logic semiconductor dies.
Retrieve technical layers for GPU CNN off-chip memory layout optimization, interposer chiplet serial data/control packet communication, and PIM-device decompression of compressed data.
Retrieve passages separating GPU-side CNN data layout/locality optimization from PIM in-memory decompression and wafer-bonded memory-to-logic high-bandwidth access.

Retrieve CNN GPU memory-efficiency disclosures on fast data layout transformation, pooling-layer working set expansion in on-chip memory, inter-kernel redundancy elimination, kernel fusion, and thread-level parallelism injection.

Retrieve distributed matrix processor architecture claims for tensor instructions that collect output tensor value statistics and dynamically assign a decimal position for fixed-point numerical representation.

Retrieve accelerated deep learning wavelet representation using index specifier, virtual channel specifier, task specifier, and data element specifier routed through nearest-neighbor routers in a 2D mesh processing-element array.

Retrieve interposer chiplet communication interface disclosures with first and second common protocol interface circuits coupled by a communication link to form a serial protocol interface between integrated circuits.

Retrieve AI processor three-dimensional stacked memory package claims where a first die includes FeRAM bit-cells and a vertically stacked inference die includes computational logic multiplier cells coupled to stored input data and weights.
Search for a microelectronic device with a conductive via electrode separated from a microelectronic component by a trench or gap-region stress relief structure.
Find memory-device claims reciting receiving compressed data to a processing-in-memory PIM device and decompressing the compressed data on the PIM device.
Retrieve neural network unit claims with at least 512 processing units, registers reading memory rows, multiplexed-register rotation, and column-channel-row convolution.
Search for wafer-bonded memory die and logic die providing embedded high-bandwidth high-capacity memory using modular three-dimensional storage-transistor arrays.
Find artificial neural network processing circuits receiving input-neuron data and synaptic weights, generating partial results, and sharing partial results over an interconnect.

Retrieve tensor accelerator claims on numerical representation, data type conversion, precision formats, and tensor processing optimization to compare with CNN GPU memory data layout, locality, and inter-kernel redundancy.
Retrieve semiconductor package claims for interposer-mounted dies communicating through a common protocol and for vertically stacked memory-compute dies used in AI processing.
Retrieve system-integration claims covering memory-side decompression engines and on-chip memory access scheduling, buffers, or address generation for three-dimensional convolution.
Retrieve platform-integration claims comparing wafer-bonded logic and memory die conductors for high-bandwidth access with cooperative ANN computation across multiple processing units.
Retrieve interposer chiplet communication claims using a common protocol interface to pair with CNN GPU optimization claims on data layout, locality, TLP, and kernel reconstruction.
Retrieve evidence linking CNN off-chip memory data layout, data locality, and inter-kernel redundancy to PIM device compressed-data decompression operations.
Retrieve claim language comparing common interposer chiplet serial protocol interfaces with wafer-bonded memory and logic die surface conductor connectivity.
Retrieve patents describing decompression of compressed data on a PIM device and wafer-bonded high-bandwidth memory access between memory and logic dies.
Retrieve technical layers for GPU CNN memory-efficiency techniques, interposer chiplet communication protocol circuitry, and PIM compressed-data decompression.
Retrieve evidence separating GPU-side CNN data layout locality optimization, in-memory PIM decompression, and wafer-bonded high-bandwidth memory-to-logic access.
